section_miscategorizations.text: Ashley is a 14-year-old female with a history of atrophic right kidney and cysts in the kidney and ovaries.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is past medical history/problem list information rather than an exam or test finding from this encounter.
This is an appropriate physical exam finding for the Findings section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Physical exam reveals normoglycemia and blood pressure within normal limits.
The patient presents with end-stage renal disease, chronic kidney disease stage five, and hypertension. She also has obstructive neuropathy and a history of recurrent kidney infections.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are diagnostic impressions and active problems, appropriate for Assessment.
